---
title: "Introduction to [`{tidyverse}`](https://tidyverse.org)"
author: "[RNVSU](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/) | [Dr. Kelly N. Bodwin](https://www.kelly-bodwin.com)"
date: 2026-03-24
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, styles.scss]
    logo: images/logo.png
    footer: "<span class='footer-icons'>
<a href='https://github.com/RNVSU' class='github-icon'>{{< fa brands github >}}</a> |
[https://rnvsu.github.io/rnvsu-meetup-mar-26-tidyverse/](https://rnvsu.github.io/rnvsu-meetup-mar-26-tidyverse/) | <a href='https://rnvsu.github.io/rnvsu-meetup-mar-26-tidyverse/' class='slide-icon'>{{< iconify streamline-freehand:performance-presentation-graph >}}</a>
</span>"
    embed-resources: true
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: images/bg.png
  data-background-size: 30%
  data-background-position: 950px 150px
  style: "margin-left: -80px;"
---
## 📢 Zoom Meetup Event Reminders {.smaller}

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
<br>

#### 🎥 Recording Notice

This meetup will be recorded for documentation and learning purposes.

#### 🤝 Inclusive Learning Space

✅ Be respectful and supportive\
✅ Participate and engage in discussions
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
<br>

#### 💬 Communication Etiquette

✅ Use chat courteously\
✅ Raise your hand if you want to speak

#### 🚫 Not Allowed

❌ Harassment or offensive comments\
❌ Disruptive behavior
:::
:::::

⭐ Let’s have a fun, engaging, and meaningful learning session!

## The R User Group of Nueva Vizcaya State University ([RNVSU](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/)) {.smaller}

<br>

🏛 **Sponsors**

-   [R Consortium](https://r-consortium.org)
-   [Nueva Vizcaya State University](https://www.nvsu.edu.ph)

🔭 **Our Vision:** RNVSU as a thriving hub for global collaboration, data science, and open science, driving innovation and sustainable development in the province.

⭐ Join us as we learn, collaborate, and create impact!

## Meet the RNVSU Organizers {.smaller}

![](images/orville.png){.absolute top="80" left="0" height="60%"}

![](images/richard.png){.absolute top="80" left="210" height="60%"}

![](images/mart.png){.absolute top="80" left="420" height="60%"}

![](images/romnick.png){.absolute top="80" left="630" height="60%"}

![](images/mer.png){.absolute top="80" left="840" height="60%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {style="font-size: 70%;"}
Orville D. Hombrebueno [Richard J. Taclay]{style="padding-left: 1em;"} [Mart Jasper G. Antonio]{style="padding-left: 2.5em;"} [Romnick L. Pascua]{style="padding-left: 1.8em;"} [Mer Joseph Q. Caranza]{style="padding-left: 1.8em;"}
:::

![](images/cte.jpg){.absolute bottom="30" left="15" height="12%"}

![](images/cas.png){.absolute bottom="30" left="350" height="12%"}

![](images/cferm.png){.absolute bottom="30" left="774" height="12%"}

## {{< fa handshake regular >}} Event Organizers

![](images/mms.jpeg){.absolute bottom="250" left="0" height="30%"}

![](images/mc.jpg){.absolute bottom="250" left="200" height="30%"}

![](images/4f.jpeg){.absolute bottom="250" left="360" height="30%"}

![](images/zbr.jpeg){.absolute bottom="250" left="600" height="30%"}

![](images/mhs.jpeg){.absolute bottom="250" left="830" height="30%"}

## [{{< fa brands meetup >}}](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/) Future Meetup Events {.meetup-heading .smaller}

<br>

#### March Meetup Events

- <span class="normal-link">
[Talk 2](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/events/313337627/?eventOrigin=group_upcoming_events):
</span> [`{tidyplots}`](https://tidyplots.org) for easy data visualization | <span class="normal-link"> [Jan Broder Engler](https://jbengler.de) </span>


    March 25, 2026 | Wednesday | 7:00-8:30 PM (PHT)
- <span class="normal-link"> [Talk 3](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/events/313596851/): </span> Introduction to [`{tidymodels}`](https://www.tidymodels.org) | <span class="normal-link"> [Emil Hvitfeldt](https://emilhvitfeldt.com) </span>

    March 27, 2026 | Friday | 9:30-11:00 PM (PHT)

#### <span class="normal-link"> [April Meetup Event](https://www.meetup.com/r-nvsu/events/313601010/) </span>

- Getting Started with <span class="normal-link"> [Quarto](https://quarto.org): </span> A Hands-On Workshop | <span class="normal-link"> [Isabella Velásquez](https://ivelasq.rbind.io/about) </span>

    April 29, 2026 | Wednesday | 9:30-11:00 PM (PHT)
    
## 🎙️Introduction to the Speaker

<iframe data-external="1" src="https://www.kelly-bodwin.com" width="1200" height="500" style="border: 1px solid #ccc" frameborder="0">
</iframe>
